caption: We've all been there - staring into a nearly-empty pantry wondering what on earth to make. But don't despair! With just two basic ingredients that most UK homes have on hand - eggs and bread - you can create FIVE completely different delicious meals. Perfect for those 'pantry chaos' moments when you need to rustle something up without popping to the shops. Save this post for your next 'what can I make with basically nothing' day! 🍳🍞
hooks: Stuck with just eggs and bread? You're 5 meals away from a feast! 🍳🍞
When your fridge is empty but you have eggs and bread... don't panic, feast! 🍳
UK home cooks, stop staring at your basic ingredients! We've got 5 meals from just eggs and bread! 🍞✨
platform_notes: Instagram carousel post with 8 slides. Ensure the first slide has a strong visual to stop the scroll. Use 2D cartoon illustrations for all slides, featuring the Peppera mascot on hook, problem, and CTA slides.

generation_request.notes: Pillar: pantry chaos. Ingredients: eggs, bread.

steps: Whisk eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon in a bowl
Dip bread slices in egg mixture, coating both sides
Fry in buttered pan until golden brown on both sides
Serve with butter and syrup or your favorite toppings
recipe.proTip: Use slightly stale bread - it absorbs the egg mixture better!

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 2 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Cut a hole in the center of each bread slice
Heat butter in a pan and place bread slices
Crack an egg into each bread hole
Cook until egg is set, flipping once, season with salt and pepper
recipe.proTip: Use the cut-out bread circles to make mini toast soldiers for dipping!

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 3 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Butter bread slices and layer in a baking dish with optional raisins
Whisk eggs, milk, sugar, and cinnamon together
Pour egg mixture over bread and let soak for 15 minutes
Bake at 180°C for 35-40 mins until golden and set
recipe.proTip: Leftover bread works best - the drier the better!

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 4 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Layer bread and cheese in a greased baking dish
Whisk together eggs, milk, mustard, salt and pepper
Pour egg mixture over bread and cheese, pressing down
Bake at 180°C for 40-45 mins until golden and puffed
recipe.proTip: Prepare this the night before and let it soak in the fridge for even better flavor!

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 5 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Hard boil eggs, then peel and chop into small pieces
Mix eggs with mayonnaise, mustard, salt and pepper
Toast bread if desired
Spread egg salad on bread and add lettuce if using
recipe.proTip: Add a pinch of curry powder for an interesting twist!
